description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a casual urban appearance. The person has long hair tied back in a ponytail and wears a short-sleeved t-shirt featuring a cartoonish graphic on the chest. The figure is dressed in fitted jeans and low-top sneakers, with visible socks peeking above the shoes. The arms are relaxed and slightly bent at the elbows, and the hands are open and natural. The overall build is average, and the clothing fits comfortably, suggesting a relaxed, everyday look suitable for city streets or parks.
description: A casually dressed adult with a ponytail, t-shirt with a graphic, jeans, and sneakers, standing in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, graphic t-shirt, and relaxed arm position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ponytail, profile of the face, and the fit of the jeans and sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the ponytail, t-shirt, and jeans, as well as the heel detail of the sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ponytail, side profile, and the overall silhouette.
